hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git (commit|add -A|add \.)'; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null || true); SECRETS=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -iE '(^|/)(\.env$|\.env\.)|secrets?\.(json|yaml|yml|txt)$|\.pem$|\.key$|credentials|\.npmrc$|\.netrc$' | head -5); if [ -n "$SECRETS" ]; then printf '⛔ Blocked: Potential secrets files staged:
%s

Unstage them or add to .gitignore first.' "$SECRETS" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force[^-]' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\b(main|master)\b'; then echo '⛔ Blocked: use --force-with-lease instead of --force when pushing to main/master' >&2; exit 2; fi
